items.title: Plugin Hot-Reload
items.description: Install and update community plugins without restarting the app. Changes take effect instantly.

items.title: Collection Runner
items.description: Run a sequence of linked .void files in serial order from the sidebar — great for API test flows.

items.title: Faster Plugin Loading
items.description: Core extensions now load from pre-bundled files, reducing startup time significantly.

items.title: Refined Loading Experience
items.description: Smoother transitions when enabling, disabling, or updating extensions — no more full loading screens on reload.

items.title: Editor Stability on Uninstall
items.description: Fixed a DOM error that occurred when uninstalling extensions with an active editor open.

items.title: Large Number Precision
items.description: JSON response parsing now preserves full precision for large integers.

welcome.headline: Welcome to Voiden
welcome.subheadline: The API client built for developers who live in their editor.

items.title: Void Files
items.description: Write API requests in plain markdown. Version-controlled, shareable, and readable by humans.

items.title: Plugins
items.description: Extend Voiden with community plugins or build your own using the Voiden SDK.

items.title: Environments
items.description: Switch between dev, staging, and production with instant variable interpolation.

items.title: Request History
items.description: Every request is logged. Search, replay, and export to curl in one click.
